notes: [logic/values/timing] cl-centerprint.countdown.count_token: STILL OPEN (unchanged by Wave-2/5): ShowCenter (HudNotifications.cs:181) hardcodes the ^COUNT value to flts[0] regardless of which float the notification's durcnt selects. COUNTDOWN_ROUNDSTART's durcnt is "1 f2" (count=f2=seconds, f1=round# feeding the %s in 'Round %s starts in'), but GameWorld.cs:1494 broadcasts Send(...,round+1,secondsLeft) so flts[0]=round# — the ^COUNT shows the ROUND NUMBER instead of the seconds in round-based modes (GAMESTART's flts[0]=seconds is correct). Latent risk for any future ^COUNT notification whose count is not the first float. ; STILL OPEN: the Base durcnt pe

[values/timing] cl-centerprint.fade.in_out: STILL OPEN (unchanged): hud_panel_centerprint_fade_in default is 0 in the port (RegisterDefaults registers "0" at CenterPrintPanel.cs:208; CvarF("fade_in", 0f) also defaults to 0) vs 0.15 in Base (centerprint.qh:6) — messages pop in instantly with no fade-in ramp.

[values] cl-centerprint.layout.draw: STILL OPEN (unchanged): Base shipped HUD skins (hud_luma.cfg/hud_luminos*.cfg:289-291) set fontscale_bold=1.2 / fontscale_title=1.3, overriding the header defaults; the port keeps the header defaults (1.4/1.8). Bold message lines + (now-live) titles render slightly larger than the stock skin.

[values] cl-centerprint.title.gametype: Title fontscale uses the header default 1.8, not the shipped-skin 1.3 (shared with layout.draw row); titles render larger than the stock skin. Minor values-only divergence.

[logic] cl-centerprint.config.preview: STILL OPEN (unchanged): when the HUD editor is open, Base generates rotating sample centerprint lines (countdown/multiline/standard/'Generic message') + a 'Title' line so the panel previews live while being positioned. The port's CenterPrintPanel has no _hud_configure preview path, so the centerprint panel renders empty in the HUD editor.

[logic] cl-crosshair.core.master_gating: Port gates only on Visible + crosshair_enabled/size/alpha/number; Base's full suppress set (scoreboard/camera/intermission2/game-stopped/lockview/spectatee==-1/HEALTH<=0/DrawCrosshair mutator hook/viewloc/minigame menu/CAMERA_SPECTATOR==2/hud!=HUD_NORMAL) is reduced to the NetGame Visible toggle (havePlayer at NetGame:2640).

[logic/values] cl-crosshair.core.origin_chase: Crosshair is always drawn at the geometric panel centre (DrawPanel: center = Size2*0.5f). The chase-camera branch (trace from player org along view_forward MOVE_WORLDONLY, project the impact, fade the player body alpha toward crosshair_chase_playeralpha while it obstructs the view, restore on chase-off via the crosshair_chase_state latch) is not implemented. ; crosshair_chase and crosshair_chase_playeralpha are not even registered in RegisterDefaults (CrosshairPanel.cs:297-370).

[logic] cl-crosshair.color.special_modes: crosshair_color_special 3 (rainbow: randomvec()*brightness re-rolled every rainbow_delay, crosshair.qc:189-196) is not ported — ColorModeCvar (CrosshairPanel.cs:537-542) maps only 0/1/2, so mode 3 silently falls back to fixed color. The rainbow_brightness/delay cvars are registered but dead.

[values] cl-crosshair.trueaim.teammate_blur_signal: Teammate shrink divisor diverges at DEFAULT cvars: Base `wcross_scale /= crosshair_hittest` divides by 1 (crosshair_hittest default 1 => NO shrink), but the port divides by a separate HitTestTeammateShrink property (default 1.25 => visibly shrinks). The port shrinks where Base does not. ; Blur is a 5x5 spread of 0.04-alpha texture copies (matches Base's CROSSHAIR_DO_BLUR for textured crosshairs, crosshair.qc:585-596); only applies to the textured path (DrawCrosshairTexture), not the vector fallback (DrawVectorCrosshair).

[logic/values] cl-crosshair.per_weapon_2d_vehicle: Per-weapon crosshair: PerWeaponNumber dict is never populated by any caller (grep finds zero assignments outside the property def CrosshairPanel.cs:97), so every weapon shows the same `crosshair` number (Base maps each weapon to its own w_crosshair pic + w_crosshair_size multiplier). ; crosshair_2d (side-scroller, default 54) is NOT registered and has no port. HUD_Crosshair_Vehicle (info.vr_crosshair) has no port.

[logic] cl-csqcmodel.predraw.dispatch_order: Order is appearance->LOD->effects (skeletal anim runs in a separate PlayerModel.Pose pass, not interleaved here); the appearance-before-LOD ordering is moot because LOD is a no-op swap. ; AutoTagIndex recursion + drawmask=0 on null-model are not part of this pass (held weapons attach via ViewEntityRenderer).

[logic/values/timing] cl-csqcmodel.animdecide.state_machine: animdecide is NOT ported: the networked anim_state / anim_upper_action / anim_lower_action / anim_time inputs are not sent or read (grep confirms zero anim_* bits in NetEntity/ClientEntityView), so upper-body ACTIONS (shoot/melee/pain/draw/taunt overlays on the torso) never play on the third-person model. ; The 8-direction + duck-variant locomotion (~24 movement clips incl. runbackwards, strafeleft/right, forwardleft/right, backleft/right, duckwalk* directional set) is replaced by a coarse 6-state heuristic keyed only on 2D speed (20/220 u/s), on-ground, ducked, dead: remote players show a sin

[logic] cl-csqcmodel.tagindex.weapon_attach: The QC h_/v_ model tag resolution cascade (weapon bone -> gettagindex weapon/tag_weapon -> shot/tag_shot, with recursive parent predraw and drawmask=0 when the tag can't resolve) is simplified to a tag_weapon marker attach; weapon-on-weapon and the shot-muzzle tag chain are not faithfully reproduced. ; No recursive predraw of the parent entity to fix forcemodel/LOD bone-index mismatch (forcemodel is live, so a forced-model bone-index mismatch on the held weapon attach is a possible edge case; LOD swap is still absent so no LOD-driven mismatch).

[logic/values] cl-csqcmodel.effects.ef_mf_trail_lights: FIX (Wave 5): the per-player forced-effects seam is now LIVE for MF_ROCKET. ClientWorld.DriveCsqcModelHooks composes ForcedAppearance(jetpackActive:true) from the networked e.UsingJetpack and passes it to CsqcModelEffects.Apply(...,forced); forced.ModelFlags ORs MF_ROCKET into modelFlags, driving both the rocket trail return and the jetpack loop. So MF_ROCKET trail + loop now fire for remote players. ; STILL OPEN: the OTHER MF trails (grenade/gib/tracer/zomgib/tracer2/tracer3) are mapped in CsqcModelEffectFlags but never supplied — base modelFlags is still 0 and only the jetpack composes MF_RO

[logic/values] cl-csqcmodel.networking.csqcmodel_contract: FIX (Wave 5): ALPHA is now FULLY wired end-to-end (closed the baseline 'half-wired/dead-on-consume' gap). The producer (ServerNet.QuantizeAlpha for players + entities), codec (WriteByte/ReadByte at EntityField.Alpha 1<<17), the client consume (ClientEntityView: `e.Alpha = s.Alpha == 0 ? 1f : s.Alpha/255f`), and the render (PlayerModel.ApplyAlpha sets per-instance GeometryInstance3D.Transparency on every mesh) are all live. A Cloaked (0.25) / Invisibility / fading player now renders translucent on the client. ; FIX (Wave 5): UsingJetpack (IT_USING_JETPACK) is now networked (NetEntityFlags widen

[logic/values] cl-hud.engine.progressbar: Bars are flat colored rects, not the rounded skin progressbar texture; the shared baralign 0/1/2/3 semantics (esp. center-bidirectional accel bar) are approximated by each panel rather than the one primitive.
[logic/values/timing] cl-hud.engine.num_color: No blink/pulse (full-health sine flash + low-health pulse) and a 2-stop instead of 5-stop gradient, so number tints differ from Base.

[logic/values/timing] cl-hud.engine.dynamic_follow: The hud_dynamic_follow HUD-shift/scale-with-viewmodel effect is unported; the HUD never sways with weapon bob. A menu checkbox (DialogSettingsGame) toggles the cvar but no draw-side code reads it.

[logic] cl-hud.panel.radar: Full BSP-minimap render + maximized clickable mode (ons spawn / teleport select) are partial; the live radar is the standalone _radar (the discovered one is force-hidden to avoid a double radar).

[values] cl-hud.panel.vote: AlreadyVoted alpha default is 0.75 vs Base luma 0.7. ; Vote state is fed from the in-process listen-server VoteController; a pure --connect client has no vote net channel yet, so the panel stays blank there.

[logic] cl-hud.panel.modicons: Mode coverage is now CA/FreezeTag/Keyhunt/Survival/Assault/Domination/CTF/Keepaway; the full per-gametype icon-art fidelity (dom point ownership icons, some flag transitions) is partial.

[logic] cl-hud.panel.infomessages: Cycling group hints (spectate controls), team-unbalanced nag, spectator list and the full message set are partially covered (the eliminated-LMS line is now present).
[logic] cl-hud.panel.quickmenu: Nested quick-chat tree from a quickmenu file + translatecommands/server_is_default parity not verified.

[logic] cl-hud.panel.minigame: Board + status are merged into one MinigameRenderer (board square + team pieces + win-line + status line) rather than the QC BOARD/STATUS split; only the implemented minigame rule-sets are renderable. Per-game _hud_board/_hud_status art coverage not all runtime-verified.

[logic] cl-scoreboard.toggle.showscores: Only the +showscores held-button path is wired (UpdateScoreboard reads BindTable.ShowScores → sets _scoreboard.Active). The death scoreboard (cl_deathscoreboard / _delay), intermission==1 forced-up, and intermission==2/QuickMenu/clickable-radar/DrawScoreboard-mutator-hook suppression branches of Scoreboard_WouldDraw are not ported.

[logic] cl-scoreboard.field.formatting: SP_FPS and SP_SKILL columns never render (FieldByLabel returns null for fps/skill — client-only display fields with no port plumbing); Base shows them colorized (fps red<=32 / yellow 64-96 / white>=128). ; scores_per_round averaging (frags/kdr/sum/dmg/score divided by SP_ROUNDS_PL) is absent (no scores_per_round toggle). ; SP_KDRATIO collapses the QC 3-branch (denom==0 raw-kills/green ported; the %.1f-vs-raw and red-on-num<=0 paths approximated — port uses '0.0' format and red on num<=0 only).

[logic/values/timing] cl-scoreboard.field.name_icons: No player-color shirt/pants swatch (gfx/scoreboard/playercolor_*), no pulsing ready check, no handicap icon (white→red by level), no ignored icon, no pulsing (Q) wants-join team marker, and no playerid '#N' prefix (Scoreboard_AddPlayerId). GetField Name returns the raw name only.

[values] cl-scoreboard.teams.grouping_totals: Only the primary team slot total is shown (SetWireRows stores wire.Teams primary slot); the secondary teamscore (e.g. keyhunt) and the team-size N/M side display (team_size_position) are not rendered. ; team_size_position (score-on-left vs right) layout option absent; totals drawn as colored banner boxes, not the QC bold hud_fontsize*1.5 side numbers.

[logic/values/timing] cl-scoreboard.block.accuracy: Drawn as plain text '%' cells, not the per-weapon ICON grid (drawpic weapon model2) with column/row highlighting. ; No accuracy_showdelay gating, no warmup suppression, no doublerows, no Accuracy_GetColor weapon ramp or nocolors option; the port's average color ramp differs from QC's per-weapon ramp.

[logic/values/timing] cl-scoreboard.block.itemstats: No item-stats block at all: Base shows a per-item icon grid of pickup counts (g_inventory.inv_items), filtered by itemstats_filter_mask=12. The port has no SetItemStats / DrawItemStats and inventory is not networked for it.

[logic] cl-scoreboard.block.mapstats: Secrets (STAT(SECRETS_*)) are still never fed → the Secrets row never shows (SecretsTotal stays -1; no feeder in NetGame). ; Monsters only feed when +showscores data is refreshed (FeedScoreboardHeader runs inside the change-gated branch).

[logic/values/timing] cl-scoreboard.ui.interactive: No interactive UI: the port scoreboard is a passive overlay. Missing TAB panel cycling (SCOREBOARD↔RANKINGS), arrow-key player/team selection, ENTER/SPACE team-join + spectate, Ctrl+C column-layout cycle, Ctrl+R scores_per_round toggle, Ctrl+T tell, Ctrl+K vote-kick, ESC exit, and the team-selection screen (scoreboard_ui_enabled==2) with its join prompts and world dimming (0.7).

[logic] cl-scoreboard.draw.export: No equivalent of Scoreboard_Draw_Export (writes the scoreboard table to a file handle for the dump-scoreboard console command); the port has no scoreboard-export command.

[logic] cl-shownames.gate.team_enemy: sameteam mechanism differs: QC sets sameteam ONLY when the server sends the private entcs slice (m_entcs_private, networked to teammates/self); the port derives it client-side from a colormap-team equality compare. The enemy-gate result matches in the common case, but the authority differs and the port can register sameteam from local data before/without the server's private-slice gate.

[logic] cl-shownames.name.decolorize: No width truncation: QC textShortenToWidth(name, namewidth=mySize.x) clamps the name to its drawing-area width before drawcolorcodedstring; the port (DrawName) draws the full name centered with NO width clamp, so long names overflow the tag box. (The draft's claim that truncation is present is incorrect.) ; Name comes from the scoreboard name slice (ResolveScoreboardName, NetGame.cs:2733), not a dedicated entcs name stream; if the scoreboard row is missing the name is empty and the tag shows no text (status bar still draws). ; Port adds a 1px black drop-shadow behind the name (DrawString offse

[logic] cl-shownames.entcs.private_healtharmor: QC only populates healthvalue/RES_ARMOR from the private entcs slice the server sends to teammates/self; enemies get zeroed health/armor (Draw_ShowNames_All:237-248). The port reads s.Health/s.Armor from the always-present remote state regardless of team. Visible result matches today because the status bar is teammate-gated, but if the port's net layer streams enemy health/armor to clients it is exposed where QC withholds it (info-parity divergence; depends on ServerNet entity-state gating).

[values] cl-teamradar.transform.coords: Port works directly in world units (no normalized texcoord stage); the inverse texcoord<->2D transforms (teamradar_2dcoord_to_texcoord / teamradar_texcoord_to_3dcoord) used only by the clickable map are not ported (no consumer exists yet). ; v_flipped (mirrored-view X flip) is not applied on any transform.

[values] cl-teamradar.icon.objective: Icon size is a radius-relative clamp (radius*0.07, 7..12px), not the fixed 8x8 px Base draws — sizing diverges, especially on a large/maximized radar. ; Port has a spurious binary icon_1/icon_2 selector keyed on RadarIcon==2, but no port code path ever sets RadarIcon to 2 (Ctf sets 1; ServerNet sends RadarIcon&0xFF and all Base ids are 0/1), so the icon_2 branch is dead — harmless but misleading vs the per-registry m_radaricon design. ; Tint relies on the server having pre-resolved wp.Color; the client-side spritelookupcolor fallback (per-weapon/item m_color, flag-carrier color) is not modeled

[logic/values/timing] cl-teamradar.icon.ping: Ping pulses missing: a teammate/objective ping draws no expanding gfx/teamradar_ping ring on the radar; neither the per-icon teamradar_times array, the bit-7 net stamping, nor the additive pulse loop is ported (ServerNet sends RadarIcon&0xFF, masking off the ping bit).

[logic/values/timing] cl-teamradar.links.onslaught: Onslaught radar links (ENT_CLIENT_RADARLINK / draw_teamradar_link / g_radarlinks) not networked or drawn — ONS radar shows control points but no connection lines.

[logic/values/timing] cl-teamradar.maximized.map: Maximized fullscreen radar entirely absent: no m-bind (+hud_panel_radar_maximized → cl_cmd hud radar 1), no fullscreen tactical overview, no separate maximized rotation/zoom/scale runtime, no default-border swap.

[logic/values/timing] cl-teamradar.maximized.click: No clickable ONS spawn-point selection (cmd ons_spawn), no teleport-click, no mouse/key input handling (MOUSE1/MOUSE2/ESC/console-key passthrough), no dead+showscores temp-hide, no 'Click to select…' prompt, no icon hover-glow.

[logic/values] cl-teamradar.cvar.zoomscale: Zoom/scale is a RangeUnits=2500 + scale/4 heuristic, not the Base mi_scale/scale2d bigsize/normalsize blend; current_zoomfraction modes 0/1 collapse to static endpoints so the +zoom-follow behavior is lost. ; Base recenters the radar between view_origin (normal) and mi_center (big) by the zoom factor; port always centers on the self origin, so 'fit whole arena' never recenters on the map center.

[logic/values] cl-teamradar.cvar.defaults: Registered cvar defaults are luma-skin values (scale 8192, foreground_alpha 1, maximized_rotation 0), not the QC code defaults (4096 / 0.8 / luma 1) teamradar_loadcvars applies when unset; a user who never touches the cvar gets 8192/1. ; hud_panel_radar enable cvar (0/1/2) not honored at runtime: no disable, no team-only gating, no '2'=show-in-non-team-modes. The dialog exposes Disable/Team/Always but nothing consumes it. ; Discovered HUD-registry radar is force-hidden (HudManager StartHiddenIds 'radar'), so only the standalone NetGame instance (256x256 at 24,24) is live.

[logic] cl-teamradar.mutator.hook: No TeamRadar_Draw client mutator hook: mutators cannot add custom blips/icons to the radar, and the hook's return value (which Base ORs into the per-icon team-match gate for hover-glow visibility) is unmodeled.

[logic/values/timing] cl-view.zoom.velocity_zoom: FOV does not widen/narrow with player speed; the cl_velocityzoom_* menu controls do nothing (ComputeVerticalFov omits the velocityzoom frustum multiplier).
[logic/values/timing] cl-view.zoom.zoom_scroll: Holding +zoom and scrolling the mousewheel does not change the zoom factor (no ZoomScroll / View_InputEvent reader).

[logic/values] cl-view.zoom.zoomscript_buttonstatus: Zoomscript auto-zoom (autocvar_fov <= 59.5 -> localcmd +button9, zoomscript_caught) is not ported. ; cl_unpress_zoom_on_weapon_switch / cl_unpress_attack_on_weapon_switch and the cl_hook_activeweapon localcmd are not modelled. ; isdemo() zoom-via-__togglezoom fallback is absent.

[logic] cl-view.chase.classic_thirdperson: Spectator third-person (View_SpectatorCamera + STAT(CAMERA_SPECTATOR) 1/2 toggle, IMP_weapon_drop cycling) is NOT ported — spectating a player renders FIRST person: the follow-cam (NetGame:4174) builds its own first-person ViewState and returns before the chase_active CameraMode logic runs. ; chase_front (the frontal selfie cam) is effectively dead: ApplyClassicChase hardcodes `spectating = false` (FirstPersonView:~415), and chase_front is QC-guarded to spectating only — so it never engages. The view-flip + overhead-while-spectating paths are untested live.
[logic/values/timing] cl-view.bob.view_bob: The view does not bob up/down while running (cl_bob), side-to-side (cl_bob2), or swing on landing (cl_bobfall).
[logic/values/timing] cl-view.roll.view_roll: The camera does not roll/bank when strafing sideways.
[logic/values/timing] cl-view.tilt.death_idle: No view roll on death (v_deathtilt) and no idle sin-wave of the view angles (v_idlescale).

[logic/values/timing] cl-view.demo.free_camera_lockview_ortho: No demo free/chase camera (CSQC_Demo_Camera), no view lock (cl_lockview), no orthographic radar-render view (cl_orthoview / View_Ortho), no viewloc 2.5D side-scroller camera (GetViewLocationFOV), and no FPS report to the server (fpscounter_update STAT(SHOWFPS)).
[logic/values/timing] cl-viewmodel.anim.networked_frames: No networked weapon fire/idle/reload animation (the QC wframe temp entity is not networked); the gun never visibly cycles or reloads.

[logic/values] cl-viewmodel.model.skin_colormap_glow_effects: View-model ignores player team colormap and per-weapon glowmod: the gun never tints to your team color or glows (e.g. Vortex charge glow), unlike Base viewmodel_draw. ; View-model has no EF_NODEPTHTEST: the gun can clip into / be occluded by nearby world geometry instead of always drawing on top of the scene. ; Per-child m_skin not applied; the gun renders with its base material.
[logic/values] cl-viewmodel.alpha.viewmodel_alpha: cl_viewmodel_alpha / cl_viewmodel_alpha_min do nothing; the menu opacity slider is inert for the gun (port only toggles Visible on/off).

[logic/values] cl-viewmodel.align.gunalign_gunoffset: cl_gunalign left/right are visually identical (side offset hardcoded 0); only center differs. Menu gunalign radio buttons barely change the gun. ; cl_gunoffset is a baked [Export] default, not read from a cvar. ; Viewmodel sway/align toggles (cl_followmodel / cl_leanmodel / cl_bobmodel / cl_gunalign / cl_viewmodel_alpha / cl_gunoffset) are baked [Export] defaults, not read from cvars — the menu checkboxes/sliders do not affect the live gun.

[values] cl-viewmodel.muzzle.flash_particle: Local muzzle position is a heuristic at the tag_shot socket rather than Base's view-projected movedir_aligned (not verified to read identically on-screen). ; Secondary fire does not flash (only the primary _attackHeld path calls Fire). ; ClientWorld.OnMuzzleFlash wrapper has no caller (NetGame calls _viewModel.Fire() directly) — dead wrapper, but the feature is live by another path.
[logic/values/timing] cl-viewmodel.muzzle.flash_model: No muzzle-flash MODEL (the spinning flash md3 for Devastator + Machinegun, m_muzzlemodel) — only the particle burst is emitted.

[values/timing] cl-viewmodel.casings.brass_eject: Casing bounce sounds (brass*/casings* on touch when vdist(velocity,>,50)) are absent: the port's CasingBody bounces on a floor plane but plays no impact sound (Base Casing_Touch emits brass1-3/casings1-3 on CH_SHOTS ATTEN_LARGE). ; Casing lifetimes (1.5/2.0s) + maxcount (64) differ from Base (10/30s, 100): casings vanish far sooner and fewer accumulate. ; Casing physics is a self-integrated gravity + single ground-plane bounce (FloorZ), not full MOVETYPE_BOUNCE world collision; on most maps no floorZ is supplied so the casing falls through and only the lifetime fade culls it. ; avelocity tumbl

[values] physics-movetypes.toss.bounce: FIXED (Wave-2): Entity.BounceFactor/BounceStop now exist (EntityWeaponState.cs:46,49) and PhysicsToss reads them via `==0 ? default : value`, matching Base's `(!x)?default:x`. The settle-threshold d is now the SIGNED Dot (MoveTypePhysics.cs:175), matching Base with grenadebouncedownslopes=1 (was abs() before). Mortar, electro-secondary, and raptor producers wire their values on the live spawn path. ; STILL OPEN (re-verified 2026-06-22): MonsterAI.SpawnProjectile (MonsterAI.cs:1276) declares bounceFactor/bounceStop parameters (:1280) but NEVER assigns them to proj.BounceFactor/proj.BounceStop (

[logic] physics-movetypes.push.pushmove: Base special-cases MOVETYPE_PHYSICS riders (push.qc:124-129): they just translate + relink and skip the PushEntity/blocked logic. The port has no such branch — a MOVETYPE_PHYSICS rider goes through the normal PushEntity sweep + stuck-check. Low impact (the port rarely uses MOVETYPE_PHYSICS riders). ; Base gathers riders via findradius over the whole live entity list (FOREACH_ENTITY_RADIUS); the port iterates Entities() with a swept-box prefilter — functionally equivalent result set, but a flat scan rather than the area-grid broadphase. ; Base zero-thickness/corpse rider squash mutates the ride

[logic/values/timing] physics-movetypes.matchticrate.interp: STILL OPEN: No Movetype_Physics_MatchTicrate equivalent and no tic_* snapshot fields on Entity (grep: zero hits in src/ for MatchTicrate/tic_origin/tic_velocity). Entities advance only on the fixed server tick, with no between-tick interpolation in this layer. In Base this smooths CSQC gibs/casings/projectiles/trains at render rate; whether visible in the port depends on its separate render-side interpolation (PredictionBuffer/ClientNet — out of this unit's scope).

[logic] physics-player.water.swim: Viewloc (1D-rail) water sub-cases not ported: physics.qc:269-270 sets wishvel.z = -160 when this.viewloc, and physics.qc:408-416 runs a SEPARATE accel path (plain addspeed accel, no PM_Accelerate QW pass) when in a viewloc. The port always runs the non-viewloc path. Inert on stock Xonotic maps (no 1D viewloc rails), so logic:partial not missing. ; Liveness of the swim path on a live water map not behaviorally confirmed this audit (depends on CheckWater correctly setting WaterLevel from map liquid contents — the SUPERCONTENTS bitmasks are mirrored as literals and untested against a real BSP wat

[logic] physics-player.ladder: func_water waterlevel-from-volume override (physics.qc:280-299: clamp wishvel to ladder_entity.speed, set watertype=skin, compute waterlevel from origin.z+view_ofs.z vs ladder maxs_z) is NOT computed in LadderMove — the port only EARLY-RETURNS from CheckWater for a func_water ladder (PlayerPhysics.cs:949) but never fills the waterlevel/watertype from the volume bounds, so a func_water ladder gives WaterLevelNone. ; Viewloc ladder sub-case (physics.qc:277-278: wishvel.z = movement_old.x) not ported.

[values] physics-player.jetpack: Jetpack tunables are HARDCODED constants in PlayerPhysics (JetpackAccelSide etc.), not read from g_jetpack_* cvars via FromCvars — a server retuning the jetpack won't take effect; the baked values match the stock cfg exactly so it is values:partial not values:missing. ; PM_jetpack maxspd_mod factor (player.qc:742 maxairspd *= max(1, maxspd_mod)) is hardcoded to max(1,1)=1 in the port (PlayerPhysics.cs:670); inert for a normal player (maxspeed_mod==1) but a spectator/high-speed-mod jetpack would diverge — unreachable in practice. ; cl_jetpack_jump is pinned ON / mode-1 semantics (JetpackJumpEna

[logic] physics-player.crouch: Viewloc force-crouch (player.qc:192-193: viewloc && !(VIEWLOC_FREEMOVE) && movement.x < 0 => do_crouch=true) is NOT ported. ; have_hook force-uncrouch (player.qc:175-195: a grappling hook held in any weapon slot forces do_crouch=false) is NOT ported — the port models the frozen/dead/PlayerCanCrouch-hook force-false but not the hook or in-vehicle (PHYS_INVEHICLE) force-false sub-cases. ; Q1BSP crouch-disable (PL_CROUCH_MAX.z == PL_MAX.z => do_crouch=false, player.qc:207-208) not modelled (Xonotic maps are Q3BSP, so inert).

[logic/values] physics-player.specialcommand: The secret movement-input cheat sequence (each tick decodes PHYS_INPUT_BUTTON_MASK -> a character, advances a position pointer through 'xwxwxsxsxaxdxaxdx1x ', resets on mismatch) that triggers CHIMPULSE_GIVE_ALL via SpecialCommand (when sv_cheats or maycheat) is not implemented — entering the konami-style code does nothing. Cheat-only, low gameplay impact, but a real Base feature.
